remarks: Please submit highest & best offers by 6 PM on 6/25/26, thank you. Absolutely Charming! This light-filled home offers three spacious living levels and a warm, inviting layout throughout. Enter into a welcoming living room with a fireplace-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The first floor also features a private office or optional fourth bedroom, along with one of three full baths. The main level is ideal for both everyday living and gatherings, featuring a large dining room with direct access to the sunroom and kitchen with an eat in area. Just off the dining room is an oversized, well-proportioned living room. Upstairs, you will find three additional bedrooms along with the third full bath. All three full baths in the home have been renovated with highest quality craftmanship. The above-grade lower level offers a fun and flexible space to unwind, complete with a wet bar and direct access to the two-car garage & laundry. Generous storage can be found throughout the home. Enjoy outdoor living on the deck-ideal for dining or relaxing-overlooking 2.6 acres of beautiful property, ready for you to personalize with endless possibilities. Set on a quiet road, close to town, schools, and the Wilton YMCA. An incredible value with wonderful potential  Please note: The town shows 2 full & 1 half bath, however this home has 3 full bathrooms.
